allowed_work: read frozen Gate 1/3 tables, P5 arrays, frozen V4 predictions, and frozen V4 pooled latents
fit deterministic offline ridge and small MLP scale-correction models under the two declared protocols
write explicit Gate 4A CSV, model-parameter JSON, summary JSON, Markdown, and fixture artifacts
prohibited_work: modify RIGNO, V4 model parameters, loss, formal training configuration, P5 data, labels, or split assignments
jointly train a shape model or enter Gate 4B
use target scale, oracle fields, residuals, or any label-derived value as a model input
write data/, output/, checkpoints/, or logs/ in the repository

gate1_table.definition: s_phys = z_collapsed_1d_operator before any label-fitted Gate 1 calibration

gate3_table.boundary_projection: raw physical temperature projection to prescribed Dirichlet values only

v4.latent: mean pool frozen rnodes_processed regional features; validate recovered raw predictions against frozen archives at <=0.02 K before accepting each export, while all field reconstruction continues to use the exact archived predictions

target_and_reconstruction.v4_uncorrected_scale: frozen V4 prediction CV-RMS scale combined with its own frozen shape
target_and_reconstruction.field_reconstruction: frozen V4 predicted shape * (s_hat + eps) + reference_temperature_K, then raw-space Dirichlet projection

input_feature_contract.latent_features: all dimensions of the corresponding frozen best/final mean-pooled rnodes_processed latent
input_feature_contract.input_provenance: physical input arrays, BC metadata/features, or frozen V4 model input-only latent only
forbidden_input_categories: Gate 1 calibrated prediction or residual columns
any label-derived residual or target statistic
input_feature_contract.normalization: Each model stores feature mean/std (and MLP target mean/std) fitted only on its protocol fit-role rows. Near-constant inputs are recorded and dropped.

selection_and_pass_contract.selection_primary: minimum selection-role scale log-RMSE among trained candidates that improve both scale log-RMSE and frozen-shape field CV-RMSE versus physics_only
selection_and_pass_contract.selection_tie_break: lower selection-role frozen-shape field CV-RMSE, then catalog order
selection_and_pass_contract.hard_adapt_clean_guard: selected candidate must not exceed physics_only valid_iid scale log-RMSE or frozen-shape field CV-RMSE by more than 5 percent
selection_and_pass_contract.pass: both best and final must pass the corresponding validation improvement criteria and agree on the direction of global-physics adequacy and latent incremental value; any hard-adapt clean-guard failure rejects that protocol
